data.body:
CHECKPOINT REWIND — manual step required

The session-internal attempt to rewind the checkpoint was blocked by the tickets-tracker-guard hook (by design: direct edits to the tickets directory are prevented). The rewind needs to happen via a new CLI subcommand OR an out-of-band manual edit.

Manual rewind (run from a terminal without the hook active):

```
cd /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.tickets-tracker
git pull origin tickets
printf '%s\n' '{"last_pull_ts": "2026-04-16T16:13:00Z", "last_run_id": "rewind-after-bug-0e38-a5da"}' > .inbound-checkpoint.json
git add .inbound-checkpoint.json
git commit -m "chore: rewind inbound checkpoint to 2026-04-16T16:13:00Z (bug 0e38-a5da)"
git push origin tickets
```

After the fix for bug 0e38-a5da lands and the checkpoint is rewound, the next scheduled run will re-fetch DIG-1560+ (and any other issues updated between 2026-04-16T16:13:00Z and now).

Follow-up: add a "ticket rewind-inbound-checkpoint <iso-timestamp>" subcommand so future rewinds don't require editing the event-sourced state by hand.
